headline: Winners And Losers Of Q1: Cigna (NYSE:CI) Vs The Rest Of The Health Insurance Providers Stocks
summary: Looking back on health insurance providers stocks’ Q1 earnings, we examine this quarter’s best and worst performers, including Cigna (NYSE:CI) and its peers.
